commit_scope: Install and invoke a source-originated BML method body through native blueprint method dispatch.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-rule-method-dispatch-proof.fk
local_validation.notes: The real-source Rule method dispatch proof passes at 1023 across Go/Rust/TypeScript kernels.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The SetProcess body parsed from original container-Rule.bml can now be installed on a native blueprint and invoked through method_invoke, mutating separate native record instances.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-rule-method-dispatch-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: Native method dispatch is proven for the source-originated SetProcess body; general method table generation, overload resolution, rich expression/control-flow lowering, and BMF-grammar.bml body lowering remain open parity gaps.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-rule-method-dispatch-proof.fk reads original container-Rule.bml, extracts the parsed SetProcess body, installs it on a native blueprint with method_define, and invokes it with method_invoke.

docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md records native method dispatch as proven for the real-source SetProcess body while keeping general method table generation and rich body lowering as gaps.
